reviews.comment:
Desastre!
El encargado Marcelo, no permitió pasar al baño, ya siendo cliente y socio del ACA.
por queja del personal.
La verdad bochornoso, no lo irrespetuoso, y altanero. No terminamos mal, porque soy educado, porque el petiso se merecía una un buen golpe

(Translated by Google)
Disaster!
The manager, Marcelo, refused to let us use the bathroom, even though he was already a customer and member of ACA.
Because of a staff complaint.
Honestly, it was embarrassing, not disrespectful, and arrogant. We didn't end badly, because I'm polite, because the shorty deserved a good smacking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDMk43Zm53RRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar combustible a las 6 AM tuve q esperar mucho para la atención cuando no abia nadie y no le funciona a la app YPF por lo que me fui

(Translated by Google)
I went to fill up at 6 AM and had to wait a long time for service when there was no one there and the YPF app didn't work, so I left.
